blocks.content: 🚨 OFFICIAL: Real Madrid statement on Negreira case.Real Madrid C. F. communicates that, in relation to the so-called 'Negreira Case', he has presented to UEFA a letter addressed to its disciplinary bodies.In this letter, the club has informed UEFA of the existence of https://t.co/9vIJmrXXqB — Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) Jun 17, 2026
